name: detector contract: --stdin reads source from stdin instead of disk; --filename labels the input
command: echo 'const x: any = 1;' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/no-any.sh" --json --stdin --filename "src/virtual.ts" 2>out.json && grep -E '"filename":"src/virtual.ts"' out.json 1>&2 && grep -E '"ruleId":"no-any"' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
